params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

items.docs: Look up an artist by MBID, optionally including sub-resources and relationships via `inc`.

params.name: query
params.description: Lucene query string (mutually exclusive with browse parameters).

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100, default 25).

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based offset into the result set for pagination.

params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

params.description: Response serialization format. Defaults to XML; set to `json` for JSON.

params.name: dismax
params.description: When true, use the simpler dismax query parser instead of full Lucene.

items.docs: Return every entry from the curated MusicBrainz genre taxonomy. Also supports `fmt=txt` for a plain-text list of genre names.

params.description: International Standard Recording Code (12 characters).

params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

params.name: fmt

items.docs: Look up all recordings that share an International Standard Recording Code.

params.name: iswc
params.description: International Standard Musical Work Code (e.g. T-101.690.320-9).

params.name: inc
params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

params.name: fmt
params.description: Response serialization format. Defaults to XML; set to `json` for JSON.

items.docs: Look up all works that share an International Standard Musical Work Code.

params.name: discid
params.description: 28-character MusicBrainz Disc ID computed by libdiscid from a CD's TOC.

params.name: toc
params.description: Table-of-contents string used for fuzzy matching when the Disc ID is not found.

params.name: cdstubs
params.description: Whether to include CD-stub matches when no release matches.

params.name: media-format
params.description: Restrict matched releases to a specific media format (e.g. `CD`, `all`).

params.name: inc
params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

params.name: fmt
params.description: Response serialization format. Defaults to XML; set to `json` for JSON.

items.docs: Look up releases that match a CD's MusicBrainz Disc ID. Supports fuzzy TOC matching and optional CD-stub fallback.

params.name: editor
params.description: MusicBrainz editor (username) whose collections to list.

params.name: inc
params.description: Plus-separated list of sub-resources and relationships to include in the response.

params.name: fmt
params.description: Response serialization format. Defaults to XML; set to `json` for JSON.

items.docs: List the collections owned by a MusicBrainz editor. Use `inc=user-collections` while authenticated to also include private collections.

params.name: fmt
params.description: Response serialization format. Defaults to XML; set to `json` for JSON.

items.docs: Look up a collection by MBID.

params.name: client
params.description: Application identifier in the form `name-version` for submission requests.

items.docs: Add up to ~400 entities (semicolon-separated MBIDs) to an existing collection.

params.name: client
params.description: Application identifier in the form `name-version` for submission requests.

items.docs: Remove entities (semicolon-separated MBIDs) from a collection.
